name: title-card
title: TitleCard
description: Hero title-card scene block: a large headline reveals with a calm blur-and-rise, a subtitle cascades word-by-word beneath it, and an optional accent underline arrives last as quiet punctuation. Composes BlurReveal / Underline and WordStagger — no new motion of its own.
pickWhen: open a scene on a single composed title beat — eyebrow + headline + accent rule, all in one curated cascade.
